prose: **Benzene frontier-orbital HOMO–LUMO gap (Koopmans orbital energy gap):** DFT, B3LYP/def2-TZVP (tier standard, density-fit RI/RIJK), PySCF. Geometry: user-supplied benzene.xyz (12 atoms, C₆H₆). Gas phase, charge 0, singlet. SCF converged in 8 cycles. HOMO = −7.0468329 eV (orbital index 20), LUMO = −0.41574728 eV (orbital index 21), gap = **6.631 eV**. This is a single-particle orbital gap (Koopmans-style), not a true excitation energy. No warnings reported; calculation integrity verified.
